title: Ozempic For Doors
description: OzempicFD, Gives open doors and trapdoors a 1-pixel hinge-side hitbox allowing ease of movement through block spaces that include doors or trap doors, Cauldrons and Composters.
body:
OzempicFD open doors and trapdoors a one-pixel hinge-side hitbox, making it easier to move through tight block spaces that include doors or trapdoors. Instead of getting snagged on vanilla hitboxes when a door is swung open, you can slip cleanly past the frame while the door is in its open state. Closed doors and trapdoors are left completely untouched, so existing builds, redstone contraptions, and mob-proofing behaviour stay exactly the same. New getting in and out of Cauldrons and Composters.

The mod is designed to feel as vanilla-friendly as possible, there are no new blocks, items, menus, or configuration screens, just different collision and outline shapes applied to existing doors and trapdoors. It works on both the client and server, and is best when installed on both sides so visual selection boxes and actual collision match perfectly.

OzempicFD is ideal for bases with cramped corridors, decorative door frames, or compact redstone hallways where every pixel of movement matters. Whether you are sprinting through your survival base, running tight parkour lines, or simply tired of bumping your head on open doors, this mod helps your builds feel smoother and more responsive without changing the overall look and logic of Minecraft.
